name: Scalloped Sweet Potatoes and Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the sweet potatoes until they are tender.
2. Slice them into 1/4 inch pieces.
3. Butter a baking dish and place a layer of sweet potato slices at the bottom.
4. Add a layer of sliced apples on top of the sweet potatoes.
5. Sprinkle sugar, salt, and mace over the apple layer.
6. Dot with butter.
7. Repeat steps 3-5 until the baking dish is filled, ensuring the top layer consists of apples only.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 50 minutes.
